Register Ludden has decided
against Nathan B. Fry Of Colville in
his fight for a homestead. The regis
ter declares that Fry did not estab-
lish residence on the land


You can get anything you want for
sewing machine at J. d. Eastman
G Co., 333 Riverside. Phone Main
74s. Machines rented or sold ON easy
terms. Expert repairing.


Chinese Inspector Scott has arrest
ed Sing Yaw. a Cocallala Chinese, for
being in this country without a GER
tficate. Yaw claims that he hooked
his certificate. which is considered
good security in Chinese circles be-
cause of its value. Yaw is ordered
deported.


Easy Work Soap-The largest cake
on the market for 6 cents. No fancy
wrapper-all soap.


At a conference OF officials of the
Washington Water Power and the
Spokane Traction companies the mat
ter Of fixing a rate which the latter
for the use of its poles for trolley
wires was left to the city council
The new company considers that the
Obj one asks too much.


New fall hat at wilson's. 713 Riv-
erHide avenue.


Mrs. A. p. Fassett declares that in
the distribution of prizes at the aster
show she was unfairly treated. She
claimed that the specimens on exhibit
tion were her own and that their ex-
hibition did not make them the prop
erty Of the association. and she took
her flowers home, along with the three
second prizes awarded her.


Trade with the Watson Drug COM
pany, corner Riverside and Washing
ton street.


Ed Baker Is under arrest for Eell-
ing alcohol to a Occur d'Alene Indian
while on trip across Hangman creek.


John De Versie. who was sent to
the Medical Lake asylum just previ-
Gus to trial on a charge Of larceny
and who escaped from that institu-
ton a few days ago, has been captur-
ed and turned over to the county au-
thorities as cured. He will now have

For a perfect fitting shirt see Will
son. 713 Riverside avenue.


John A. Finch denies the story that
the Federal Mining & Smelling COM
pany has disposed Of the smelter at
Everett to the American Smelling &
Refining company. He states that an
agreement exists whereby the smelt-

company.


Have your prescriptions filled
where you are sure Of getting fresh.
pure drugs and competent pharma-
cist to compound them. You get all
these at Watson's Drug Store. corner
Riverside and Washington.


The fall meeting Of the Presby-
terrain synod for Washington, north
ern idaho and Alaska convenes in
the Fourth Presbyterian church, this
city. the seth. on the evening Of which
there will be popular meeting, with
Rev. John A. Rogers Of Davenport.
retiring moderator as preacher.
Fall shirtings open for inspection
at wilson's. 713 Riverside avenue.
The normal school at Cheney was
formally opened yesterday with ad-
dresses by State Superintendent Bry-
an and Rev. @. r. Wallace Of this
city. The attendance was 1875 and
still more are expected.


The Club Cafe always in the lead.
Our Csc merchants lunch with beer
or wine from 1880 to Q p. m. an good
as ever. Headquarters for steaks,
chops. etc. I. Chilberg. manager.
Fred z. Alexander, clerk in the
money order department Of the local
postoffice, was thrown from his wheel
yesterday and sustained a double
fracture of the collar bone and bad
ly bruised shoulder.


First open a savings account with
this bank: then add to this account
as rapidly as circumstances will al
low you. BY so doing you will soon
become financially Independent. The
wage Garner finds our evening hour
adapted to his convenience. Open
Saturday evenings from to s. De-
posits made now draw interest from
October 1. Spokane & Eastern Trust
